things.description: Twin waterfalls accessible by a jungle hike with swimming pools

things.description: Traditional Pohnpeian drink made from pepper plant roots - central to social life

things.name: Pohnpei State Museum
things.description: Cultural artefacts and natural history of the Caroline Islands

things.name: Fishing in the Pacific
